body.title: workflow.md as single source of truth; /workflow + uu workflow both output it
body.intention: I intend that the workflow map lives in ONE file (skills/workflow.md) that both the /workflow skill and `uu workflow` render, so there is a single source of truth to maintain instead of a map duplicated (and drifting) inside the skill.
body.description:
**Problem:** The workflow map is embedded in skills/workflow/SKILL.md and has drifted (repo copy still says /decided; the ~/.claude copy says /sorted). Akien wants one source of truth he can point to, renderable from the shell.

**Shape:** Extract the map to skills/workflow.md (at skills/ root — NOT inside skills/workflow/, because it spans most skills, not one). Simplify skills/workflow/SKILL.md to just output that file (no duplicated map). Add a `uu workflow` verb that prints skills/workflow.md to the console (early, venv-free, no chat launch). Correct the stale /decided -> /sorted in the canonical map.
**Affected files:** skills/workflow.md (new, source of truth); skills/workflow/SKILL.md (simplify to point at it); uu (add `workflow` verb).
**Design rules:** single-source-of-truth; skills-live-in-repo; no duplicated map text.
**Scope boundary:** IN — the file, the skill simplification, the uu verb, the /decided->/sorted fix. OUT — the full uu <verb> dispatcher (T-uu-cli-dispatcher); a full audit of every skill's accuracy.
**Test plan:** `uu workflow` (via _cmd_workflow) prints exactly the contents of skills/workflow.md and the map contains current markers (THE TRACKING STACK, /sorted, /sprint-ticket) and not the stale /decided; SKILL.md points at skills/workflow.md and no longer embeds the map.
**Completion criteria:** skills/workflow.md exists and is the only place the map lives; `uu workflow` prints it verbatim; SKILL.md references skills/workflow.md and contains no duplicated map; /decided is gone from the map (uses /sorted).

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
…and 38 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: skills/workflow.md is the single source of truth (skills/ root, spans all skills); /workflow SKILL.md cats it (no embedded map); uu workflow prints it verbatim; stale /decided purged to /sorted. Proof: tests/test_workflow_md_source_of_truth.py @ b99a6acf (stub-first red→green).
